payload.answer: Saved a minimal memory card indicating the URL fetch failed with a 404 network error; did not store any article content.
payload.decision: Store minimal metadata about the fetch failure (URL unreachable) without asserting article content.

entity_resolution.reason: The only reliable entity is the URL and the fact of a fetch failure; no additional entities from article content are available.

payload.intent: Evaluate how to store context about a failed article fetch in Brain memory system.

memory_cards.statement: An attempted fetch of https://example.com/missing resulted in a 404 network error; the article content was not retrieved.
This failed fetch context is intended to be useful for memory architecture.

details: Stored fetch-failure metadata without claiming article content.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL and store success/failure outcome with timestamp.
Provide alternative source content or cached text if available.
If the URL is incorrect, update the stored URL to the correct canonical link.
